creator: fenner@parc.xerox.com
text:
The mpeg_encode and mpeg_stat software has moved; the old FTP server says:

250-    -----------------------------------------------------------
250-    The Berkeley multimedia group's FTP site has moved to
250-    mm-ftp.cs.berkeley.edu (ftp://mm-ftp.cs.berkeley.edu/pub/).
250-    -----------------------------------------------------------

How-To-Repeat: 
	
cd graphics/mpeg_encode; make fetch
cd graphics/mpeg_stat; make fetch
